title: Forbidden error when using X OAuth2 credentials
symptom: When attempting to use the X OAuth2 API with certain scopes, the user receives a 'Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials' error. This prevents successful execution of the workflow.
not_this_if: Only using predefined scopes without media.write
Error does not occur with other OAuth2 configurations
root_cause: The error occurs because the X API requires specific scopes to be included together for certain actions. If the required scopes are not properly configured or if the API does not recognize the combination, it results in a forbidden error.
fix_steps: Ensure all necessary scopes are included in the OAuth2 configuration
Add tweet.write and media.write along with any other required scopes
Reconnect the OAuth2 credentials in n8n
agent_instruction: Include all necessary scopes in the OAuth2 configuration and reconnect the credentials.
